description: Allowlist for pre-existing stub markers that are intentionally not debt-log rows. Each entry must have an owner, reason, and expires_at date so the CI gate blocks new undocumented markers.

entries.reason: Frontend draft calls the registered portal-backend payment stub while the test VPS payment flow is active.
Workspace package lifecycle scripts are non-executed placeholders until package build/test ownership is classified.
Lint script placeholder is outside the runtime/test gates fixed by this remediation.
Build/lint script placeholders are outside the canonical runtime verification gate.
Historical service development guide describes registration policy for future metadata ingestion work.
Historical service development guide describes pre-canonical repository scaffolding and registration policy.
Historical service development guide describes future editor integration work rather than active runtime code.
Task-system documentation describes lifecycle policy and not an active implementation stub.
Roadmap text describes transient planning risk, not an active implementation stub.
The document describes generated scaffold examples rather than an active runtime stub.
Deterministic mock AI agent runtime adapter (source "mock", MOCK_AGENT_RUNTIME_ID) is an intentional local/test adapter; the real LLM provider adapter is tracked by LEGACY-0029, not by these markers.
Integration tests exercise the mock AI agent runtime adapter by design; not runtime stub debt.
"mock" is a declared value of the agent-source enum (mock | local | provider) in the AI contract, not a stub.
Test asserts the not-implemented fallback branch of the assistant registry; not implementation debt.
Test stubs the browser canvas path (drawImage/toDataURL) for deterministic assertions; test-only.
Descriptor names the intentional test-only Cards Money Trains game package; it is product test content, not an implementation stub.
Browser acceptance deliberately exercises the separately addressed test-only game package while author content is pending.
Runtime acceptance deliberately loads the separately addressed test-only game as data; duplicate-action debt is tracked by LEGACY-0052.
